name: translation-toolkit
description: High-quality translation across i18n / technical docs / ad copy / novel chapters for EN / JA / ZH-TW / ZH-CN with bundled CC-BY glossary (~10K+ entries) and 5-gate verification (placeholder integrity / glossary compliance / back-translation / register / untranslatability). v0.2.0 adds translation-novel — scene-aware chunking + scene-window prompts (~17× cost reduction vs whole-doc windowing).
